/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_raw_ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_shared_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_capture_structs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_control_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_integration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_v4l2_loopback.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_frame_rotator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_hardware.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camera_daemon_tests.dir/test_full_integration.cpp.o -o camera_daemon_tests  ../libcamera_core.a -lcamera -lcamera-base -lpthread -lrt -ljpeg -lpthread -lrt -lgstrtspserver-1.0 -lgstapp-1.0 -lgstbase-1.0 -lgstreamer-1.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
